# Shadow Supply Repository Instructions

Treat repository files as the source of truth.

Before changing code:

- Read `PROJECT_CONTEXT.md`, `CURRENT_STATUS.md`, and `SYSTEM_MAP.md`.
- Search for the existing implementation.
- Preserve save/load compatibility and serialized references.
- Do not replace complete systems with simplified versions.
- Return or commit full scripts when a script is modified.
- Update `BUGS.md` and `CHANGELOG.md`.
- Do not edit files under `Library/PackageCache`.
